prompt: Autonomous driving front-facing camera footage, slowly driving on the elevated highway near Lujiazui, Pudong, Shanghai on a rainy night. Windshield wipers periodically sweep across the bottom of the frame leaving water streaks. A red bus ahead brakes with its tail lights on, splashing water. Standing water on the road reflects neon lights from skyscrapers on both sides, forming blurred colorful streaks. Lane markings reflect off the wet road surface. Raw sensor output image quality with water droplets on the lens.

Dashcam real footage, driving on Beijing's Fourth Ring Road in dense morning fog. Visibility is under fifty meters; the taillights of the vehicle ahead dissolve into blurry red halos in the fog. A street-sweeping water truck suddenly merges from the right lane into ours, spraying water mist onto the windshield and momentarily blocking the view. Concrete lane dividers on both sides of the road fade in and out of the fog. The footage has typical dashcam fisheye distortion and a timestamp watermark.

Autonomous driving perception camera perspective, driving on Sheikh Zayed Road in Dubai under the blazing midday sun. Heat waves shimmer off the road ahead creating a mirage effect where distant vehicles appear to float on water. A camel suddenly darts onto the road from the desert side, causing emergency braking in the right lane. The white road surface glares intensely with slight overexposure. Palm trees on both sides cast sharp shadows. The footage has strong sun glare and sensor overexposure areas.

Vehicle-mounted camera nighttime footage, driving through consecutive curves on Tokyo's Shuto Expressway C1 Inner Loop. A white GT-R ahead traces a red arc with its taillights through the curves. Reflective markers on the concrete barriers on both sides streak past at high speed. The banked road surface causes the frame to tilt slightly. Tokyo Tower's red lights flash briefly between buildings in the distance. Nighttime image quality shows noticeable noise and motion blur.

Dashcam real footage of a torrential downpour, driving on Guangzhou's Inner Ring Road during a sudden cloudburst. Rain is so heavy that the wipers at maximum speed still cannot fully clear the curtain of water on the windshield. A food delivery e-bike ahead skids and wobbles in the standing water, nearly tipping over. Road flooding has risen past the wheel hubs, throwing up huge splashes. Traffic signals behind the rain curtain blur into red and green blobs of light. Raw image quality with water droplets clinging to the lens.

Autonomous driving front-facing camera, descending a steep hill street in San Francisco. The frame shows an extreme downward tilt as the road ahead plunges like a cliff. A cable car slowly crosses at an intersection from the right. Cars parked along the curb are angled with their wheels turned into the slope. The Bay Bridge and fog-shrouded Angel Island are visible in the distance. Noticeable fisheye distortion at the lens edges. Overcast with flat, even lighting.

Vehicle-mounted dashcam footage, late at night on the Moscow Ring Road (MKAD). Thin ice on the road surface reflects light as a large truck ahead suddenly changes lanes, triggering emergency braking and ABS activation. Dirty slush and ice chips flung from the truck hit the windshield, briefly blocking the view. Dim yellowish streetlights illuminate the snow-covered road shoulders. An MKAD highway sign reflects in the headlights in the distance. Cold temperatures give the footage a cool color cast with noticeable noise.

Autonomous driving camera daytime footage, navigating a narrow old-town street in Mumbai during peak traffic. A decorated cow lies leisurely in the middle of the road, blocking two lanes and refusing to move. Auto-rickshaws and motorcycles squeeze through the gaps on both sides of the cow. Roadside vendors' handcarts encroach on the driving space. Pedestrians weave through traffic effortlessly. The frame is crowded and chaotic, brimming with the vivid energy of Indian street life.

Dashcam dusk footage, severe congestion on the Los Angeles 405 freeway. Red taillights ahead form an endless ribbon of red stretching to the horizon. The setting sun faces the lens directly, producing intense glare and halos. A Tesla in the right lane activates its turn signal trying to cut in. The Hollywood Hills appear in silhouette against the orange sky in the distance. The image is mostly static, inching forward a few meters occasionally.

Vehicle-mounted camera snowy night footage, driving near Zhongyang Street (Central Avenue) in Harbin. Heavy snow falls as snowflakes lit by the headlights rush toward the lens like a dense barrage of white particles. A taxi ahead slides slowly on the icy surface with its rear end fishtailing slightly. European-style buildings on both sides are blanketed in thick snow with warm yellow light glowing from windows. Pedestrians bundled up head-to-toe lean into the wind. Snowflakes accumulate on the lens progressively.

Autonomous driving front-facing camera, entering the Piccadilly Circus roundabout in London. Right-hand-drive perspective, reversed from the typical left-hand-drive view. A red double-decker bus in the roundabout's inner lane blocks the right-side sightline. Colorful light from electronic advertising screens reflects off the wet road surface. A black taxi merges into the roundabout from the left. Pedestrians hurry across the zebra crossing. Overcast and rainy with flat, cool-toned lighting.

Dashcam early morning footage, morning rush hour on Chengdu's Third Ring Road. A wobbling three-wheeled cart loaded with vegetables drives in the far-right lane; several cabbages roll off and fall onto the road. Vehicles behind swerve to avoid them. The just-risen sun creates a backlit strobe effect as light flickers through gaps in the elevated highway. A bus stop is packed with commuters waiting for their ride. Standard dashcam image quality with a visible timestamp watermark.

Autonomous driving camera footage, driving on a Riyadh urban expressway during a sandstorm. Yellow sand dust reduces visibility to under a hundred meters, turning the sky an eerie orange-yellow. Vehicles ahead flash their hazard lights through the sandy haze. A thin layer of fine sand covers the road surface. A billboard sways violently in the strong wind, its support frame visibly deformed. The entire image has a yellow-brown tone with sensor noise from sand interference.

Vehicle-mounted camera post-rain footage, crawling through Singapore's Orchard Road shopping district. Puddles on the road act as mirrors, reflecting the giant LED advertising screens of the malls on both sides to create perfectly symmetrical reflections. A woman with an umbrella suddenly dashes out of a roadside shop and jaywalks. The taxi ahead brakes hard, throwing up an arc of spray. Tropical post-rain humidity fills the air, slightly blurring distant building outlines. Saturated colors with a strong sense of wetness.

Dashcam nighttime footage, driving the winding mountain roads near Jiefangbei in Chongqing. Continuous hairpin turns on extremely narrow roads; oncoming headlights shine directly into the lens causing severe glare. Below lies a dense sea of city lights like a galaxy. A motorcycle suddenly emerges from a blind curve, nearly causing a head-on collision. Reflective markers on the retaining wall flash sequentially in the headlights. The frame tilts and sways slightly from the winding driving.

Autonomous driving perception footage, driving on a Montreal highway during a blizzard. The road is completely buried under white snow with lane markings entirely invisible. A snowplow ahead flashes orange warning lights while slowly working, tossing snow chunks to the roadsides. Following distance is extremely close because everything beyond is obscured by the blizzard. Road signs are covered in thick snow, text unreadable. Sensor snow interference creates white spots in the footage.

Vehicle-mounted camera midday footage, chaotic traffic at Tahrir Square in Cairo. Vehicles in at least five lanes completely ignore lane markings and merge at will. A donkey cart plods along between two modern cars. Pedestrians dart through the relentless traffic to cross the street. A mosque minaret is clearly visible under the harsh sun in the distance. Car horns blare incessantly. Strong sunlight creates a high-contrast, overexposed image.

Dashcam dawn footage, driving along a coastal highway in Hokkaido, Japan. The gray-blue Pacific Ocean stretches to the right with distant fishing boat lights flickering. A deer suddenly leaps out from the forest on the left and crosses the road, triggering emergency braking. The deer's eyes reflect green in the headlights. Fallen leaves scattered on the road swirl up in the vehicle's slipstream. The horizon shows a faint orange glow. Image quality has low-light dawn noise.

Autonomous driving front-facing camera, Sukhumvit Road in Bangkok before an afternoon thunderstorm. The sky is half covered in dark clouds and half blue, creating dramatic lighting. A tuk-tuk ahead suddenly makes a U-turn, forcing our lane to a stop. Lightning strikes in the distance, illuminating the entire horizon. Colorful taxis line up along the roadside. A large shopping mall's LED sign stands out vividly against the dark sky. The frame overexposes momentarily during the lightning flash.

Vehicle-mounted camera evening footage, driving across the Bosphorus Bridge in Istanbul. Through the left window, ferries on the strait and the lights of the European shore are visible. Dense traffic ahead inches forward. A yellow taxi weaves through lanes aggressively. The bridge's suspension cables stretch like black harp strings in the twilight. The last rays of sunset paint the strait's surface in gold and crimson, visible from the bridge side. Backlit silhouette scene.

Autonomous driving camera footage, a straight stretch of US Route 66. The road extends like a ruler toward a vanishing point on the desert horizon. Heat waves create a liquid refraction effect on the distant road surface. A coyote darts out of brush on the right side of the road, trots across, and disappears to the left. A rusty sign at an abandoned gas station creaks in the wind. Strong sunlight gives the image a yellowish overexposed cast.

Dashcam footage, driving on the curving bridges of the Atlantic Ocean Road in Norway. Massive waves surge over the bridge deck, seawater covering the road for several seconds. Vehicles ahead brake hard with red lights on. The bridge deck trembles slightly from the wave impacts, causing the frame to shake. The gray sky and gray sea merge into one. The next arched bridge appears and disappears amid the spray in the distance. Cold gray overcast tones.

Vehicle-mounted camera autumn footage, driving on a country road in Vermont, USA. Maple trees on both sides form a tunnel of fiery reds and golds as fallen leaves spin and dance in the vehicle's airflow. A farm tractor ahead crawls along with no room to pass. Behind the tractor is a trailer full of pumpkins, a few rolling around from the bumps. A white steepled church peeks through the autumn foliage in the distance. Soft autumn light with warm, saturated colors.

Autonomous driving front-facing camera, a rural road in Thailand during a torrential rainstorm. The road is severely flooded as vehicles wade through water half-submerged. A water buffalo stands belly-deep in water in the middle of the road. A motorcycle rider stands on the seat trying to keep their shoes dry. Roadside rice paddies are completely submerged with only the tops of the stalks visible. Wipers running at full speed but the image remains blurry. Raw sensor image quality.

Dashcam nighttime footage, driving late at night on the Stuart Highway in the Australian Outback. Headlights illuminate only fifty meters ahead; beyond is total darkness. A huge kangaroo suddenly appears in the middle of the road with brightly reflecting eyes, triggering emergency braking. The startled kangaroo leaps away and vanishes into the darkness. The Milky Way is clearly visible on the distant horizon. Animal carcass remains occasionally appear in the headlights on the road surface.

Vehicle-mounted camera early morning footage, driving Iceland's Ring Road (Route 1). The road cuts through a black volcanic lava landscape devoid of vegetation. A strong crosswind whips volcanic ash across the road like a black curtain of fog. A volcano erupting in the distance sends a gray smoke column into the sky. The road surface is covered in volcanic ash with clear tire tracks. Occasional geothermal steam vents shoot white steam from the roadside. A desolate scene.

Autonomous driving perception camera, a high-altitude section of China's National Highway 219 in Tibet. A desolate highland road above five thousand meters elevation; a herd of Tibetan antelope crosses the road ahead as the vehicle stops to wait. Snow-capped mountains stretch across the horizon under a deep blue sky. The road surface is severely cracked and potholed from freeze-thaw cycles. A military-green truck passes slowly on the opposite lane, kicking up dust. Intense UV light makes the image colors overly vivid.

Dashcam footage, driving on a Hokkaido national highway during a winter blizzard in Japan. Snow banks on both sides tower above the car roof, forming a white corridor. A snowplow ahead throws snow to the roadside in white arcs with its spinning blade. Following at a crawl, vision is obscured by the kicked-up snow mist. Occasional clear stretches reveal a vast white snowfield in the distance. Warm air from the car heater causes slight fogging at the lens edges.

Vehicle-mounted camera afternoon footage, driving on Route 40 in Patagonia, Argentina. A straight gravel road under strong crosswinds pushes the vehicle sideways. A flag-shaped tree permanently bent by prevailing westerly winds stands at the roadside. A group of guanacos crosses the road ahead in no particular hurry. Snow-capped Andean peaks stand crisp against the blue sky in the distance. Gravel kicked up by the tires pings against the undercarriage. The frame shakes slightly from the wind.

Autonomous driving camera dusk footage, the iconic Monument Valley stretch of US Route 163 in Utah. The signature straight road extends toward the red rock pillars ahead. Massive sandstone monuments appear as deep red silhouettes in the sunset. A motorcyclist ahead stands on the pegs while riding, enjoying the scenery. Sand dust swept by the wind blows across the frame. Golden backlighting creates strong lens flare.

Dashcam heavy fog footage, a country lane in the Cotswolds, England. Dense fog limits visibility to under twenty meters. A flock of sheep suddenly appears on the road, herded slowly along by a sheepdog. A shepherd in a green raincoat waves to signal a stop. Stone walls and ancient oak trees loom ghostlike in and out of the fog. The entire image is in gray-white tones with the soft, diffused light characteristic of heavy fog.

Vehicle-mounted camera footage, descending the 72 Turns of the Nujiang River mountain pass in Yunnan, China. Continuous hairpin bends with a sheer cliff drop on one side and a vertical rock wall on the other. A large truck fully loaded with timber occupies most of the road through the curves. Oncoming vehicles squeeze past on the inside of the curves with extremely tight clearance. Dozens of zigzag switchbacks and the river in the valley floor are visible far below. The frame tilts continuously with each turn. High altitude with intense UV light.

Autonomous driving front-facing camera, crossing the red desert of Namibia. An unpaved gravel road winds between massive red sand dunes. A springbok suddenly leaps out from behind a dune and bounds across the road. Red sand kicked up by the wind forms a low curtain of dust. The corrugated road surface causes persistent high-frequency vibration in the footage. Red dunes ripple like waves to the horizon in the distance. Harsh afternoon sunlight with overexposure.

Dashcam nighttime footage, a winter polar night highway in the Lapland region of Finland. Northern lights are active in the sky, green curtains of light dancing above the road. The icy road surface reflects the green aurora glow. A herd of reindeer blocks the road ahead, their eyes reflecting bright spots in the headlights. Reflective snow poles along the roadside mark the snow-buried road edges. Only headlights and the aurora provide illumination in the polar night; severe noise in the footage.

Vehicle-mounted camera midday footage, driving along the coastal highway in Baja California, Mexico. The deep blue Pacific with white waves crashing against the shore stretches to the right. A sea lion lies in the middle of the road sunbathing and refuses to move. Several cars ahead have already stopped to wait. The road edge has been eroded by seawater, crumbling to reveal sandy soil. In the distance, a gray whale's spout is visible in the sunlight on the ocean surface. Strong sea winds sway the roadside bushes, causing slight frame vibration.

Autonomous driving camera footage, driving on a dirt road in the Maasai Mara Reserve in Kenya, Africa. An elephant walks slowly right down the middle of the road and will not yield. The elephant's rear end fills nearly the entire road width. Following at a safe distance at a crawl. Red soil kicked up by the elephant's feet creates a thin haze. The long necks of giraffes are faintly visible among distant acacia trees. The rough, potholed road surface causes continuous bouncing and vibration. Red dust stains the lens.

Dashcam footage during a storm, driving on a mountain national road in Shikoku, Japan. During a typhoon, branches and leaves are ripped away by fierce winds and slammed against the windshield. A large tree ahead has been uprooted and toppled across the road, completely blocking traffic. Rain pours down in sheets with extremely low visibility. A small mudslide on the roadside slope has spilled onto the road surface. Police vehicle red lights flash blurrily behind the curtain of rain. The frame shakes severely with water droplets covering the lens.

Vehicle-mounted camera dawn footage, driving along Loch Ness on the A82 road in Scotland. Thin mist drifts over the lake as morning light tints the water surface silver-gray. A stag stands by the road guardrail with massive antlers silhouetted like a tree crown in the dawn light. A ruined castle in the distance appears as a ghostly silhouette in the fog. The road surface is damp and reflective with moss growing from cracks in the curbing. Cool blue-green color tones imbued with the tranquility of early morning.

Autonomous driving perception footage, crossing Bolivia's Salar de Uyuni during the rainy season. The road merges with the salt flat as the surface is a thin layer of water over a white salt crust. Sky and ground form a perfect symmetrical reflection, making it appear as though the vehicle is driving through the sky. A tourist off-road vehicle ahead kicks up white saltwater spray. The horizon is completely indistinguishable from the sky. Cactus islands on the salt flat appear like mirages in the distance. A surreal scene.

Dashcam afternoon footage, driving the winding coastal road of the Amalfi Coast in Italy. An extremely narrow two-way road with a vertical cliff dropping to the blue Mediterranean on one side. A large blue tour bus coming from ahead takes up most of the road, requiring a reverse maneuver at the cliff's edge to let it pass. Colorful houses in the distance stack like building blocks on the cliff face. Lemon tree branches extend from the roadside, nearly brushing the car roof. Strong Mediterranean sunlight with highly saturated imagery.

Autonomous driving camera footage, a construction zone occupying two of three lanes. Orange cones and construction barriers narrow the passable space. A construction worker in a reflective vest holds a stop sign in the road, directing traffic. An excavator's massive bucket hangs above the road, loading rubble. The temporary traffic light ahead changes from red to green. The road surface is uneven, with gravel and mud obscuring the original lane markings. Daytime backlighting.

Dashcam footage of a traffic accident ahead. Two vehicles have collided head-on with debris scattered everywhere. Police car, fire truck, and ambulance lights flash alternately in red, blue, and orange. Traffic officers direct vehicles to detour around the accident scene in a single lane. Deployed white airbag fabric can be seen hanging from a car window. Shattered glass on the road surface sparkles in the headlights. Bystanders photograph the scene from the roadside. Overcast gray lighting.

Vehicle-mounted camera footage, following a large concrete mixer truck driving slowly ahead. The huge mixing drum rotates continuously. Some concrete overflows from the drum opening, dripping onto the road and leaving gray stains. The mixer truck leans heavily while turning, blocking the view. Following too closely, the rear wheels can be seen crushing road cracks and splashing mud. An industrial district backdrop with gray factory buildings and smokestacks. Flat overcast lighting.

Autonomous driving front-facing camera, a tire blowout on the vehicle ahead on the highway. Rubber fragments fly from the front car's left rear tire, bouncing and tumbling across the road. The car ahead loses control, swerving left and right trailing white smoke. Our vehicle makes an emergency lane change to avoid it. Shredded tire remnants litter the lane. More vehicles behind brake hard with a wall of red taillights. The frame shakes slightly from the emergency maneuver. High-speed motion blur.

Dashcam footage, a manhole cover on a city road is suddenly forced up by water pressure. A geyser-like water column shoots several meters high from the open manhole, drenching passing pedestrians. The car ahead swerves to avoid the gushing water. Municipal repair vehicles arrive on scene as workers set up warning cones. Water begins to pool and spread across the road. Afternoon sunlight hitting the water column creates a small rainbow. Standard dashcam image quality.

Vehicle-mounted camera nighttime footage, following a flatbed truck transporting an oversized wide-load ahead. Steel beams extend beyond the lane width on both sides, fitted with red warning lights and reflective flags. An escort vehicle ahead flashes yellow warning lights to clear the way. Oncoming traffic is forced to stop and wait for the wide load to pass. The bottom of the steel beams hangs dangerously close to the road surface, nearly scraping over bumps. Nighttime image quality with noticeable noise and overexposed lights.

Autonomous driving camera footage, a mountain road after heavy rain. The road ahead is partially buried by a small landslide of mud and rocks, leaving only half a lane passable. An off-road vehicle struggles through the mud with wheels spinning and mud spraying. The roadside rock face continues seeping water as small streams of mud keep flowing down. A traffic controller on scene waves a flag to direct single-lane alternating traffic. Mud depth varies across the road surface. Overcast, dim lighting.

Dashcam footage, a small cargo truck ahead with its rear doors springing open during a sharp turn. Dozens of cardboard boxes tumble out of the cargo bed and scatter across the entire road. Vehicles behind brake hard to avoid them. One box lands right on our car's hood, bounces up, and flips over the roof. The truck driver is completely unaware and continues driving. Boxes on the road are crushed and deformed by subsequent vehicles. A sudden, chaotic real-life scene.

Vehicle-mounted camera footage, waiting at a railroad level crossing for a train to pass. The red-and-white crossing gate descends as warning bells ring. A long freight train thunders past directly ahead. Graffiti on dozens of railcars flashes by rapidly, forming colorful streaks. The train's air turbulence violently shakes the bushes alongside the crossing. Vehicles waiting on the opposite side are briefly visible through the gaps between cars. Flat midday lighting.

Autonomous driving front-facing camera, approaching a tunnel entrance. Transitioning from bright outdoor light into a dark tunnel. The sensor auto-adjusts exposure as the image rapidly shifts from overexposed to dark, then recovers to normal. Inside the tunnel, orange sodium lamps cast everything in a warm yellow tone. The faint taillight of a motorcycle ahead is the only reference point. Tunnel wall tiles reflect the lights. Rotating ventilation fan shadows flicker. Noticeable exposure transition.

Dashcam footage, a large advertising balloon has broken loose above a city expressway and drifts over the road. The silver balloon, several meters in diameter, sways in the wind and could drop at any moment. Multiple vehicles slow down to watch. The balloon's trailing rope gets caught on an SUV's tire and is dragged along. Workers on the distant mall rooftop where the balloon was originally anchored can be seen waving. An absurd real-life scene, captured during the day.

Vehicle-mounted camera footage, a fire truck racing ahead at full speed with sirens blaring as all vehicles pull aside to make way. The fire truck's red body and flashing lights dominate the center of the frame. More emergency vehicles follow behind, visible in the rearview mirror. Our vehicle slows down and pulls onto the shoulder. The fire truck's passing creates an air blast that slightly rocks our vehicle. In the distance, thick smoke billows from a high-rise building with a helicopter circling overhead. Real emergency footage.

Autonomous driving camera footage, a busy city road where a crowd of passengers at a bus stop surges into the road to flag down the bus. An elderly person with a cane slowly boards the bus, blocking all traffic behind. A delivery tricycle recklessly overtakes on the bus's right side, nearly colliding with an oncoming e-bike. The non-motorized vehicle lane is packed with food delivery riders checking their phones while riding one-handed. A typical Chinese urban mixed-traffic scene. Afternoon side lighting.

Dashcam hailstorm footage, caught in a sudden hailstorm. Golf-ball-sized hailstones pound the windshield and hood with tremendous noise. Vehicles ahead scramble to shelter under overpasses. Hailstones bounce off the road like white ping-pong balls. A large hailstone cracks the upper-right corner of the windshield, producing a spiderweb fracture pattern. The road surface is quickly covered in white ice pellets. The frame shakes from the impacts.

Vehicle-mounted camera footage, driving through urban flooding. Floodwater has risen to half the wheel height as an SUV ahead generates a massive V-shaped bow wave. A low-clearance sedan has stalled in the water with the driver standing on the roof waiting for rescue. Shopfronts along the road are barricaded with sandbags. Trash cans and debris float in the floodwater. A whirlpool forms over a storm drain. Gray overcast sky with cold light reflecting off the water surface.

Autonomous driving camera footage, nighttime driving on a Saudi Arabian desert highway. A large herd of camels crosses the road ahead. The camels' dark bodies are nearly invisible against the dark road surface at night; only their reflective eyes are visible. Emergency braking to a stop to wait for the herd to pass. In the distance, oil field gas flares burn with an orange glow in the desert. The frame is extremely dark with severe noise; only the headlight-illuminated area is visible.

Dashcam footage, driving on a single-lane road in the Indian Himalayas. The road is barely wide enough for one vehicle, with a bottomless abyss on one side. An oncoming bus requires our vehicle to reverse hundreds of meters along the cliff edge to yield. The tires are less than thirty centimeters from the cliff's edge. A river at the bottom of the thousand-meter-deep gorge appears as a thin thread. Loose gravel continually tumbles off the road into the abyss. Heart-pounding footage.

Vehicle-mounted camera dusk footage, driving in Dakar, Senegal, Africa. A vividly painted modified minibus is stuck ahead in traffic. The vehicle is covered in colorful artwork and Arabic script. The rooftop luggage rack is piled high with bundles and live chicken cages. Passengers climb in and out through both doors and windows. Women along the road balance fruit baskets on their heads, selling wares while weaving through traffic. The setting sun bathes the dusty street in gold.

Autonomous driving front-facing camera, winter on the Alaska Highway in Canada's Yukon Territory. At minus forty degrees, the road surface is covered in black ice. A moose stands in the middle of the road ahead, its massive antlers resembling a chandelier in the headlights. Faint aurora shimmer on the distant horizon. Dense white exhaust from the tailpipe is unusually thick in the extreme cold, obscuring the rear view. The image has an extremely cold color temperature with a strong blue cast.

Dashcam midday footage, riding in the stream of motorbikes through Hanoi's Old Quarter in Vietnam. Motorbikes surround from every direction in suffocating density. A mother carries three children on a single motorbike, navigating effortlessly through the swarm. Hundreds of motorbikes pack together at a red light ahead. When the light turns green, they surge forward like a bursting dam. Overhead wires crisscross like a spider web. The fisheye lens captures an extremely wide chaotic scene.

Vehicle-mounted camera footage, driving onto a ferry crossing on a road alongside the Amazon River in Brazil. The vehicle drives onto a crude wooden-plank ferry to cross the muddy river. The ferry rocks in the current, tilting and swaying the frame. A truck ahead is heavy enough to make the ferry visibly sink, with the deck edge nearly level with the water surface. Floating logs are visible in the river. Tropical jungle on the far bank rises like a green wall. Black diesel exhaust drifts past the lens.

Autonomous driving perception footage, driving on the public roads of the Monaco F1 circuit. Passing through the famous Fairmont Hotel hairpin turn. Luxury hotels and the yacht marina line the outside of the curve. Rubber marks from race cars remain on the road surface. A Lamborghini ahead cruises slowly, showing off with a roaring exhaust. Ferraris, Porsches, and other supercars line the roadside. Strong Mediterranean sunlight with a high-contrast image.

Dashcam footage, a sudden earthquake strikes while driving on Tokyo's Rainbow Bridge. The bridge deck starts to sway noticeably as bridge towers and cables visibly oscillate. Vehicles ahead all brake to a stop. The Odaiba Ferris wheel sways in the distance. Ships on the water below also rock. The frame shakes continuously during roughly thirty seconds of tremors. Expanding road cracks and visible displacement at bridge deck joints. Authentic earthquake footage quality.

Vehicle-mounted camera footage, driving on a dirt road in the Serengeti Plains, Tanzania, Africa. A massive termite mound takes up half the road ahead. A troop of monkeys sits atop the mound grooming each other. As the vehicle slowly drives around it, a male lion rises from the tall grass less than five meters from the car. The lion stares directly into the camera with complete fearlessness. The red dirt road is rough, with continuous frame vibration. Afternoon golden light.

Autonomous driving camera footage, urban flooding in Seoul's Gangnam district caused by torrential rain. Floodwater pours back up from an underground parking garage entrance. The road ahead is submerged to window height, with multiple cars drowned to their rooftops. A firefighting inflatable raft paddles across the flooded street to rescue trapped passengers. Trash and debris float on the murky water surface. Streetlights still glow, casting reflections on the water. A dark, oppressive, tense scene.

Dashcam footage, driving on the Karakoram Highway in Pakistan. The highest paved international road in the world. A section ahead has been washed out by glacial meltwater, leaving only half the road surface. Workers use a bulldozer to make emergency repairs at the cliff's edge. Seven-thousand-meter snow-capped peaks are clearly visible against the blue sky. A colorfully decorated Pakistani truck approaches from the opposite direction, its horn echoing through the canyon. Intense UV at four thousand meters of altitude, oversaturated imagery.

Vehicle-mounted camera rainy-day footage, driving a mountain road near Bogota, Colombia. A landslide strikes the road ahead during heavy rain. Red mud carrying rocks surges down the hillside, covering half the road surface. A motorcycle is knocked down by the mudflow as the rider struggles to stand up. Vehicles behind carefully navigate around the edge of the mud. Rescue workers in yellow rain gear direct traffic at the scene. Rain and mud mix on the lens.

Autonomous driving front-facing camera, driving on a gravel road over Greenland's ice sheet. The road surface is gravel laid over permafrost. An Arctic fox stands in the middle of the road, curiously watching the vehicle and refusing to move. The blue tongue of a glacier at the ice sheet's edge is clearly visible in the distance. The desolate tundra flanks the road with occasional Arctic wildflowers. Summer midnight sun casts light from an extremely low angle, creating ultra-long shadows. Cool color temperature.

Dashcam footage, driving the road from Kathmandu to Pokhara in Nepal. An extremely narrow mountain road with a head-on encounter with an overloaded bus. Passengers sit on the bus rooftop with luggage spilling over both sides. The two vehicles inch past each other with centimeter-level clearance. The roaring Trisuli River rages below. Mud-filled potholes of unknown depth dot the road surface. Passengers on the oncoming bus lean out windows to help judge the gap.

Vehicle-mounted camera footage, driving on a Siberian federal highway in Russia during winter. At minus fifty degrees, the road surface is like a skating rink. An oil tanker truck ahead creeps along, its exhaust pipe belching thick white clouds like a smoke bomb. Roadside snow banks tower above the car roof. The sun barely rises, leaving the sky in perpetual blue-purple twilight. Frost continuously forms on the windshield edges, encroaching on the field of view. Extreme cold weather footage.

Autonomous driving camera footage, traversing the Duku Highway across the Tianshan Mountains in Xinjiang, China. Ahead lies the Tielimaitipass at an elevation of 3,700 meters. Ice-covered hairpin bends with a cliff on one side and a vertical snow wall on the other. A loaded truck skids on a curve, its rear end swinging toward the cliff side. Snow-covered Tianshan peaks glisten in the sunlight in the distance. Icy patches on the road surface appear dark blue. High-contrast imagery with intense UV.

Dashcam footage, driving in Phuket, Thailand during a severe storm. Tropical cyclone-force winds bend roadside palm trees almost horizontal. A sheet of metal torn from an advertising sign flies across the road, nearly striking a vehicle ahead. Torrential rain turns the road into a stream with water flowing downhill across the surface. Storefront shutters clatter violently in the wind. Whitecaps rage on the distant sea. The frame shakes severely.

Vehicle-mounted camera footage, driving through clouds on a mountain expressway in Guizhou, China. After climbing onto an elevated bridge, the vehicle suddenly enters a cloud layer with visibility dropping to zero. The taillights of the car ahead vanish completely in the white mist. The elevated bridge spans a bottomless deep valley on both sides. Occasional breaks in the clouds reveal miniature-like villages and terraced fields below. Emerging from the clouds, the view suddenly opens up with blinding sunlight. Extreme contrast between inside and outside the cloud layer.

Autonomous driving perception footage, driving on a road through Madagascar's red-soil region during the rainy season. The road has become a river of deep red mud. A four-wheel-drive vehicle ahead is stuck in the mire, wheels spinning frantically and spraying red mud. Local villagers are pulling a rope tied to oxen to help tow the car out. Baobab trees stand like giants along the roadside. A water-filled hole in the middle of the road is too large to judge its depth. The frame is heavily contaminated with red mud spots; the lens is severely dirty.

Dashcam footage, driving Bolivia's Death Road — North Yungas Road. One of the most dangerous roads in the world. A single-lane gravel road with a six-hundred-meter vertical cliff on one side with no guardrail. A tour bus ahead reverses at a curve to make way, its wheels less than half a meter from the cliff edge. Gravel dislodged by the wheels tumbles into the abyss, with the sound of impact audible seconds later. Clouds rise from the valley floor. An extreme vertigo-inducing scene.

Autonomous driving camera footage, deep inside Switzerland's Gotthard Tunnel. Monotonous orange lighting repeats through the seventeen-kilometer-long tunnel. Exhaust from a large truck ahead accumulates in the tunnel, forming a visible haze layer. Overhead ventilation fans roar and spin. Green emergency bay lights appear every five hundred meters. Tunnel wall tiles reflect rapidly past on both sides of the field of view. A prolonged sense of claustrophobia.

Dashcam footage, a long-distance drive across the Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge. The bridge deck stretches straight into the distance, disappearing over the sea. The gray-blue waters of the Lingding Ocean flank both sides as white lighthouses and bridge towers pass by in sequence. A strong crosswind causes the vehicle to drift slightly. Ahead, the bridge enters the undersea tunnel section, transitioning abruptly from an open sea view into the enclosed artificial island passageway. Bridge surface reflective lane markers glint in the sunlight. Clear weather with a bright image.

Vehicle-mounted camera footage, the transition between the undersea tunnel and bridge at Japan's Kanmon Straits. Bursting out of the tunnel exit, intense sunlight floods the frame as it transitions from extreme darkness to brightness. Immediately driving onto the cross-strait bridge, the cities on both banks of the strait unfold into view. A large container ship passes directly beneath the bridge, its mast nearly grazing the underside. Seagulls circle above the bridge deck. A dramatic exposure transition segment.

Autonomous driving front-facing camera, driving on the Aizhai Bridge suspension bridge in China. The bridge deck sits over three hundred meters above the valley floor, making driving feel like floating in mid-air. Through the bridge railings, sheer cliff faces and the winding mountain road far below are visible in the deep gorge. Cloud layers drift at bridge height, partially shrouding the bridge in mist. A crosswind gust pushes a light van to one side. Distant bridge towers soar into the clouds. The suspension cables vibrate subtly in the wind. A dizzying high-altitude scene.

Dashcam footage, driving through Norway's Laerdal Tunnel, the world's longest road tunnel at twenty-four kilometers. Artificially lit blue-light grottos inside the tunnel are designed to alleviate claustrophobia. When passing the second grotto, a wide motorhome ahead occupies nearly the entire lane. Overtaking with extremely tight clearance between the two vehicles. The constant temperature inside the tunnel causes condensation droplets on the windshield to glimmer in the lights. A monotonous long-tunnel scene.

Vehicle-mounted camera storm footage, driving across the Oresund Bridge in a storm between Denmark and Sweden. Wind speed warning signs on the bridge flash yellow alerts. Crosswinds push the vehicle out of its lane, requiring constant steering correction. Surging waves crest over the lower sections of the bridge, throwing up white spray. A truck ahead visibly sways in the wind. The Swedish coast is a blur in the rain and fog in the distance. The frame shakes continuously with a lateral motion from the wind.

Autonomous driving camera footage, inside China's Qinling Zhongnanshan Tunnel. An LED ceiling display inside the eighteen-kilometer dual-bore tunnel simulates a blue sky with white clouds. Dense traffic ahead degrades the tunnel's air visibility into a gray-blue haze. Changing light colors appear at intervals to combat driver fatigue. SOS phones and fire extinguisher cabinets on the tunnel walls streak past in sequence. A visual-fatigue-inducing long-tunnel scene.

Dashcam footage, driving across the Seven Mile Bridge in the Florida Keys over brilliant turquoise waters. The bridge stretches straight as an arrow toward the horizon with shallow green tropical water on both sides. A pelican swoops low past the windshield. The remaining pier stumps of the abandoned Old Seven Mile Bridge stand like teeth in a row off to the right. Low-lying coral reef islands with visible palm trees appear in the distance. Intense tropical sunlight with a highly saturated image.

Vehicle-mounted camera footage, driving on the Ganhaizi Grand Bridge on China's Ya'an–Xichang Expressway. The bridge deck sits over two hundred meters high, making it feel like floating in mid-air. The deep gorge below with the winding Dadu River is visible beneath the bridge. Dense fog rises from the valley floor and swallows the bridge deck, reducing visibility to just a few meters in an instant. Emerging from the fog, blinding sunlight and sweeping views of more viaducts threading through the mountains. Temperature differentials cause lens fogging with blurry edges.

Autonomous driving perception footage, a single-lane bridge on Iceland's Route 1. Only one vehicle can cross at a time, requiring alternation with oncoming traffic. An oncoming truck has already driven onto the bridge, so we must wait at the bridge head. A frozen river flows slowly beneath the bridge. The bridge deck is icy, and the steel grating emits a humming resonance. A glacier tongue extends from the mountains in the distance like a white protrusion. Cold, low-light footage with a cool blue tone.

Dashcam late-night footage, driving a deserted western China expressway. Ahead is nothing but endless darkness with only the headlight-illuminated road surface and white lane markings. A rabbit springs up from the center of the road and vanishes into the roadside grass. Distant oncoming headlights appear from kilometers away, slowly brightening before flashing past. The Milky Way is clearly visible through the sunroof overhead. An extremely dark frame with severe noise.

Vehicle-mounted camera dawn footage, driving along South Africa's Garden Route coastal road. The eastern horizon transitions from black to deep blue to orange-red. A troop of baboons sits on the road guardrail watching the sunrise. One bold baboon jumps onto the hood and presses its face against the windshield, peering inside. On the ocean surface, the first rays of sunlight illuminate a distant whale's spout. A pre-dawn low-light scene that gradually brightens as the exposure continuously adjusts.

Autonomous driving camera footage, a road along the South Rim of the Grand Canyon at sunset, USA. The setting sun drops directly at the end of the road ahead like a massive orange-red orb. Strong backlighting silhouettes the entire scene; vehicles ahead become black outlines. Red rock layers at the roadside glow deep crimson in the final light. An eagle's silhouette flies across the face of the sun. Severe backlighting with obvious lens flare and halos.

Dashcam nighttime footage, driving down the Champs-Élysées in Paris at night. Rows of plane trees on both sides are draped in white fairy lights like a river of stars. The Arc de Triomphe stands majestically ahead, illuminated by lights. The wet road reflects the twin rows of lights, forming a symmetrical corridor. A pair of pedestrians suddenly darts out from between two cars to jaywalk. A taxi in the adjacent lane brakes hard with its horn blaring. Nighttime urban lighting quality with halos and chromatic aberration.

Vehicle-mounted camera sunrise footage, driving on a road through the Bagan Plains in Myanmar. Thousands of pagoda spires pierce through the morning mist under the golden sunrise in a magical scene. A monk ahead rides a bicycle slowly down the center of the road, his orange robes billowing in the morning breeze. Hot-air balloons drift gently skyward in the distance. An ox cart crosses the road from a field path. Low-angle morning sunlight creates a strong warm color cast and long shadows.

Autonomous driving front-facing camera, a desert highway in Utah, USA under a full moon night. Moonlight illuminates the desert almost like daylight, but all color has drained away into a silvery-gray palette. A coyote's shadow is clearly visible on the road surface in the moonlight. Distant rock mesas appear as enormous geometric forms under the moon. With headlights off, the road is still visible by moonlight alone. Extremely low-light, noisy footage, nearly monochrome.

Dashcam dusk footage, driving a cliff-side road on Santorini, Greece. The road winds along the caldera rim with a spectacular Aegean Sea sunset to the right. A group of tourists on donkeys plods along ahead, blocking traffic. White houses and blue-domed churches line the cliff above the road. The sun is half-sunk below the horizon, turning the sea to liquid gold. Strong warm backlit scene.

Vehicle-mounted camera nighttime footage, driving along Singapore's Marina Bay waterfront expressway. To the left, the Marina Bay Sands hotel and Supertree Grove light show is underway, with purple-blue lasers sweeping across the night sky. A Lamborghini ahead casts a blue glow on the road from its LED underglow lighting. The Marina Bay Flyer's lights form colorful reflections on the water surface. Urban light pollution turns the night sky purple. Nighttime city footage with overexposed lights and prominent halos.

Autonomous driving camera footage, driving during polar night in Iceland at midday. It is two o'clock in the afternoon but the sky shows only deep blue twilight, as if just before dawn. Headlights stay on to illuminate the ice-and-snow-covered road. A lighthouse in the distance flashes its rhythmic light in the darkness. Black ice on the road is nearly invisible. Occasional small towns passed have warm yellow light glowing from windows like fireflies in the dark. Extremely low illumination with the sensor at maximum gain.

Dashcam sunrise footage, driving the winding mountain road of Mount Tai in China. It is still dark as headlights illuminate the steep hairpin turns. Ancient calligraphy stone steles carved into the roadside rock face flash by in the headlights. A line of climbers ahead forms a winding trail of headlamp lights ascending the mountain road. The eastern horizon gradually turns red as the first sunlight illuminates the golden roof of a temple at the summit. The frame transitions from very dark to gradually bright with extreme dynamic range.

Autonomous driving camera footage, driving on China's Gansu Water Highway. The road is built through a reservoir, making it feel like driving on the water's surface. Emerald-green water stretches on both sides, nearly level with the road surface. A large fish has been washed onto the road ahead by a wave and thrashes around on the asphalt. Distant mountain reflections on the water make it feel like driving through a Chinese ink painting. Gentle ripples from the breeze occasionally lap over the road edge. A surreal yet real scene.

Dashcam footage, driving the Tateyama Kurobe Alpine Route in Japan after winter snow removal and road reopening. Vertical snow walls up to twenty meters high line both sides of the road, forming a white canyon. A tour bus ahead crawls through the snow-wall canyon. Only a narrow strip of blue sky is visible overhead. Geological-layer-like snow strata are visible on the snow walls. Occasionally, chunks of snow break from the top and crash onto the road surface. A spectacular yet oppressive white corridor.

Vehicle-mounted camera footage, driving through a disaster zone in the Philippines after a typhoon. The road is littered with downed coconut trees, power poles, and roofing sheets. Rescue vehicles ahead use chainsaws to clear roadway obstacles. A military truck loaded with relief supplies struggles through the debris. Various furniture and personal belongings soak in the standing water on the road. Surviving residents sift through the rubble of roadside ruins for belongings. Grim, gray post-disaster lighting.

Autonomous driving perception footage, driving through the Zhangye Danxia Landform scenic area in China. The road passes through rainbow-colored Danxia hills. Rock formations on both sides display multi-colored stripes of red, yellow, orange, green, and gray, like a divine palette. A tour bus ahead has pulled over at a viewpoint as tourists pour out to take photos. The road surface is dark red from iron-rich minerals. Afternoon side lighting makes the Danxia colors intensely vivid and saturated. The sensor faithfully records the surreal colors.

Dashcam footage, driving near the Hiroshima Peace Memorial Park in Japan. It is the evening of August 6th, the memorial anniversary. The road ahead is bathed in warm yellow light from thousands of floating lanterns. The Peace Memorial Museum dome stands solemnly in the illuminated distance. Pedestrians along the road carry candles, lining up to place lanterns on the river. Countless paper lanterns drift slowly downstream like a golden river of stars. A serene and solemn nighttime scene.
